subcodes.first_line: O thou peerless sapling of the divine garden! The revered Father traversed the distance with the utmost eagerness and joy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نهال بیهمال بوستان الهی حضرت ابوی با کمال شوق و شادمانی طی مسافت نمود و
subcodes.subjects: @humor; jokes, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
